roadmap.title: HTML Fundamentals
roadmap.description: Learn HTML5 structure, semantic elements, forms, tables, and multimedia elements.

roadmap.title: CSS Basics
roadmap.description: Master CSS selectors, box model, flexbox, grid, and responsive design principles.

roadmap.title: JavaScript Essentials
roadmap.description: Understand variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, and ES6+ features.

roadmap.title: Version Control with Git
roadmap.description: Learn Git basics, branching, merging, pull requests, and GitHub workflow.

roadmap.title: Responsive Web Design
roadmap.description: Build mobile-first layouts using media queries, viewport units, and fluid typography.

roadmap.title: Build First Projects
roadmap.description: Create landing pages, portfolio site, and simple interactive apps to solidify knowledge.

roadmap.title: React.js Fundamentals
roadmap.description: Master React components, props, state, hooks, and the virtual DOM concept.

roadmap.title: State Management
roadmap.description: Learn Context API, Redux Toolkit, and Zustand for managing app-wide state.

roadmap.title: APIs & Async JavaScript
roadmap.description: Master fetch API, Axios, async/await, Promises, and REST API integration.

roadmap.title: CSS Frameworks & Preprocessors
roadmap.description: Learn Tailwind CSS, SASS/SCSS, and CSS-in-JS solutions for scalable styling.

roadmap.title: Testing Fundamentals
roadmap.description: Write unit tests with Jest, integration tests, and component tests with React Testing Library.

roadmap.title: Performance Optimization
roadmap.description: Learn lazy loading, code splitting, memoization, and Core Web Vitals optimization.

roadmap.title: Build Full Projects
roadmap.description: Create a full-featured SPA with authentication, API integration, and deployment.

roadmap.title: TypeScript Mastery
roadmap.description: Deep dive into TypeScript, generics, decorators, advanced types, and TypeScript with React.

roadmap.title: Next.js & SSR/SSG
roadmap.description: Master Next.js App Router, server components, SSR, SSG, ISR, and full-stack capabilities.

roadmap.title: System Design for Frontend
roadmap.description: Learn micro-frontends, design systems, monorepos, and scalable architecture patterns.

roadmap.title: Advanced Performance
roadmap.description: Master Core Web Vitals, streaming, PWA, service workers, and advanced caching strategies.

roadmap.title: DevOps & CI/CD
roadmap.description: Set up GitHub Actions, Docker basics, Vercel/Netlify deployments, and monitoring.

roadmap.title: Open Source & Leadership
roadmap.description: Contribute to open source, mentor others, conduct code reviews, and lead technical decisions.

roadmap.title: Programming Fundamentals
roadmap.description: Master Python or JavaScript basics: data structures, algorithms, OOP, and problem solving.

roadmap.title: Web Basics & HTTP
roadmap.description: Understand how the web works, HTTP methods, status codes, headers, and REST principles.

roadmap.title: Node.js & Express
roadmap.description: Build servers with Node.js, create REST APIs with Express, handle middleware and routing.

roadmap.title: Databases (SQL)
roadmap.description: Learn SQL fundamentals, MySQL/PostgreSQL, CRUD operations, joins, and indexing.

roadmap.title: Authentication & Security
roadmap.description: Implement JWT, OAuth, bcrypt password hashing, CORS, and basic security practices.

roadmap.title: Deploy Your First API
roadmap.description: Deploy Node.js APIs to Railway, Render, or Heroku with environment variables and databases.

roadmap.title: Advanced Node.js
roadmap.description: Event loop, streams, clustering, worker threads, and high-performance Node.js patterns.

roadmap.title: NoSQL Databases
roadmap.description: MongoDB, Redis for caching, database design patterns, and when to use SQL vs NoSQL.

roadmap.title: GraphQL APIs
roadmap.description: Design and build GraphQL schemas, resolvers, mutations, subscriptions, and Apollo Server.

roadmap.title: Microservices Architecture
roadmap.description: Build distributed systems with microservices, message queues, Docker, and API gateways.

roadmap.title: Testing & Documentation
roadmap.description: Unit testing with Jest, integration testing, API documentation with Swagger/OpenAPI.

roadmap.title: DevOps Basics
roadmap.description: Learn Docker, Kubernetes basics, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployments on AWS/GCP.

roadmap.title: System Design
roadmap.description: Design scalable systems, load balancing, CAP theorem, consistency models, sharding.

roadmap.title: Advanced Security
roadmap.description: Penetration testing basics, OWASP Top 10, data encryption, and security audits.

roadmap.title: Observability & Monitoring
roadmap.description: Set up logging, tracing, metrics with ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana, and alerts.

roadmap.title: Cloud Architecture
roadmap.description: Design cloud-native applications on AWS/GCP/Azure with serverless and managed services.

roadmap.title: Performance Engineering
roadmap.description: Database query optimization, caching strategies, connection pooling, and profiling.

roadmap.title: Python for Data Science
roadmap.description: Python basics, NumPy, Pandas for data manipulation, and Jupyter notebooks.

roadmap.title: Statistics & Probability
roadmap.description: Descriptive statistics, probability distributions, hypothesis testing, and statistical inference.

roadmap.title: Data Visualization
roadmap.description: Create compelling charts with Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly for data storytelling.

roadmap.title: SQL for Data Analysis
roadmap.description: Write complex SQL queries, window functions, CTEs, and analyze datasets.

roadmap.title: Machine Learning Basics
roadmap.description: Supervised learning, linear/logistic regression, decision trees with Scikit-learn.

roadmap.title: First EDA Projects
roadmap.description: Complete Exploratory Data Analysis projects on Kaggle datasets and document findings.

roadmap.title: Advanced Machine Learning
roadmap.description: Ensemble methods, SVM, clustering algorithms, feature engineering, and model selection.

roadmap.title: Deep Learning Foundations
roadmap.description: Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs with TensorFlow/Keras or PyTorch.

roadmap.title: Natural Language Processing
roadmap.description: Text processing, sentiment analysis, transformers, and Hugging Face ecosystem.

roadmap.title: MLOps & Model Deployment
roadmap.description: Deploy models with FastAPI, MLflow for tracking, Docker, and CI/CD for ML pipelines.

roadmap.title: Big Data Tools
roadmap.description: Spark, Hadoop basics, cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift), and data pipelines.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: Cutting-edge AI research and production ML

roadmap.title: Generative AI & LLMs
roadmap.description: Fine-tuning LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG systems, LangChain, and AI agent development.

roadmap.title: Research & Publications
roadmap.description: Read and implement SOTA papers, contribute to research, write technical blogs.

roadmap.title: ML System Design
roadmap.description: Design ML systems at scale, real-time inference, feature stores, and data governance.

roadmap.title: Linux & Shell Scripting
roadmap.description: Master Linux commands, bash scripting, file permissions, process management, and cron jobs.

roadmap.title: Networking Fundamentals
roadmap.description: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, load balancing concepts, firewalls, and SSL/TLS.

roadmap.title: Git & Version Control
roadmap.description: Advanced Git workflows, branching strategies, GitFlow, and monorepo management.

roadmap.title: Docker & Containers
roadmap.description: Build Docker images, write Dockerfiles, Docker Compose, and container networking.

roadmap.title: CI/CD Pipelines
roadmap.description: Build automated pipelines with GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and GitLab CI for testing and deployment.

roadmap.title: Cloud Basics (AWS)
roadmap.description: AWS fundamentals: EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS, and basic infrastructure setup.

roadmap.title: Kubernetes
roadmap.description: Kubernetes architecture, pods, deployments, services, Helm charts, and cluster management.

roadmap.title: Infrastructure as Code
roadmap.description: Terraform, Ansible, and Pulumi for provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure.

roadmap.title: Monitoring & Observability
roadmap.description: Set up Prometheus, Grafana dashboards, ELK stack, distributed tracing with Jaeger.

roadmap.title: Security (DevSecOps)
roadmap.description: Security scanning, secrets management with Vault, SAST/DAST, and compliance automation.

roadmap.title: Service Mesh
roadmap.description: Istio, Linkerd, traffic management, mutual TLS, and observability in microservices.

roadmap.title: Platform Engineering
roadmap.description: Build Internal Developer Platforms, golden paths, and developer experience tooling.

roadmap.title: SRE Practices
roadmap.description: SLIs/SLOs/SLAs, error budgets, incident management, chaos engineering, and reliability.

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.description: Learning both frontend and backend basics

roadmap.title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript
roadmap.description: Complete frontend fundamentals with HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript.

roadmap.title: Node.js & Express APIs
roadmap.description: Build backend servers with Node.js and create RESTful APIs with Express.

roadmap.title: Databases (SQL + NoSQL)
roadmap.description: Learn PostgreSQL for relational data and MongoDB for document storage.

roadmap.title: React Front-end
roadmap.description: Build dynamic UIs with React, hooks, and connect to your Express backend.

roadmap.title: Authentication & Deployment
roadmap.description: Implement JWT auth and deploy full-stack apps to cloud platforms.

roadmap.title: Build CRUD Applications
roadmap.description: Create complete CRUD apps with user auth, database, and responsive UI.

roadmap.title: Next.js Full-Stack
roadmap.description: Next.js App Router, API routes, server/client components, and full-stack capabilities.

roadmap.title: TypeScript
roadmap.description: Add type safety across entire stack with TypeScript, generics, and strict configurations.

roadmap.title: Advanced State & Data Fetching
roadmap.description: TanStack Query, Zustand, SWR, and optimistic updates for production applications.

roadmap.title: Testing Full Stack
roadmap.description: End-to-end testing with Playwright/Cypress, API testing, and frontend unit tests.

roadmap.title: Performance & Optimization
roadmap.description: Next.js optimizations, image optimization, caching, and Core Web Vitals.

roadmap.title: Scalable Architecture
roadmap.description: Monorepo architecture, micro-frontends, BFF pattern, and design systems.

roadmap.title: Real-time & Event-Driven
roadmap.description: WebSockets, Server-Sent Events, event sourcing, CQRS, and message brokers.

beginner.title: Personal Portfolio Website
beginner.description: Build a stunning portfolio with HTML, CSS animations, and JS interactions. Include hero section, projects grid, and contact form.

beginner.title: Weather App
beginner.description: Fetch real weather data from OpenWeatherMap API. Show current weather, 5-day forecast with animated icons.

beginner.title: To-Do List App
beginner.description: Full-featured task manager with local storage, categories, priority levels, and drag-and-drop reordering.

intermediate.title: E-commerce Product Page
intermediate.description: React-based product page with cart, filtering, search, infinite scroll, and Stripe-like checkout flow.

intermediate.title: Real-time Chat UI
intermediate.description: Messenger-like chat interface with React, WebSocket connection, emoji picker, and typing indicators.

intermediate.title: Dashboard Analytics App
intermediate.description: Admin dashboard with Chart.js/D3 visualizations, data tables, dark mode, and responsive layout.

advanced.title: Design System & Component Library
advanced.description: Build a complete design system with Storybook, accessibility, TypeScript, and npm publishing.

advanced.title: Next.js SaaS Starter
advanced.description: Full-featured SaaS boilerplate with auth, subscriptions, admin panel, multi-tenancy, and Stripe integration.

beginner.title: REST API with Authentication
beginner.description: Build a complete REST API with user registration, login, JWT tokens, and protected routes.

beginner.title: URL Shortener
beginner.description: URL shortening service with custom slugs, click tracking, analytics, and Redis caching.

intermediate.title: Real-time Notification System
intermediate.description: Push notification service using WebSockets, message queues, email notification, and dashboard.

intermediate.title: File Upload & Processing Service
intermediate.description: Multi-file upload system with image processing, S3 storage, CDN delivery, and metadata extraction.

advanced.title: Distributed Task Queue
advanced.description: Build a Bull/BullMQ-based job queue with priorities, retries, rate limiting, and monitoring dashboard.

beginner.title: EDA on Titanic Dataset
beginner.description: Complete exploratory analysis with survival prediction, beautiful visualizations, and statistical insights.

beginner.title: Movie Recommendation System
beginner.description: Content-based and collaborative filtering recommendation engine using MovieLens dataset.

intermediate.title: Sentiment Analysis API
intermediate.description: Real-time sentiment analysis API with transformer models, FastAPI, Redis caching, and monitoring.

intermediate.title: Stock Price Predictor
intermediate.description: LSTM-based stock prediction with technical indicators, backtesting engine, and Streamlit dashboard.

advanced.title: AI Chat Application with RAG
advanced.description: LLM-powered Q&A over custom documents using LangChain, vector database, and streaming responses.

beginner.title: Dockerized Multi-Service App
beginner.description: Containerize a full-stack app with Docker Compose, multi-stage builds, and health checks.

beginner.title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
beginner.description: Build automated GitHub Actions pipeline with testing, linting, Docker builds, and deployment to cloud.

intermediate.title: Kubernetes Cluster Setup
intermediate.description: Deploy a microservices app on Kubernetes with Helm charts, autoscaling, and monitoring.

advanced.title: Internal Developer Platform
advanced.description: Build IDP with Backstage.io, self-service infrastructure, golden paths, and developer portal.

beginner.title: Blog Platform
beginner.description: Full-stack blog with user auth, rich text editor, comments, likes, and responsive design.

beginner.title: Social Media Clone
beginner.description: Twitter/Instagram-like app with posts, follows, real-time feed, image uploads, and notifications.

intermediate.title: Project Management Tool
intermediate.description: Jira/Trello clone with boards, drag-and-drop tasks, team collaboration, and real-time updates.

advanced.title: SaaS Multi-tenant Platform
advanced.description: Complete SaaS with multi-tenancy, billing, admin portal, API rate limiting, and white-labeling.

badges.name: 3-Day Streak
badges.description: Logged in 3 days in a row

badges.name: Week Warrior
badges.description: Logged in 7 days in a row

greetings: Hello! I'm your AI career advisor. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Ready to accelerate your tech career? Ask me anything!
Hey! I'm here to guide you on your learning journey. What's on your mind?

low: You're just getting started — consistency is key! Try to learn for at least 1 hour daily.
Everyone starts somewhere. Focus on the fundamentals and build strong roots.
Don't be discouraged! The first 25% is always the hardest. Keep going!
mid: You're making great progress! You've built a solid foundation.
Halfway there! This is where most people slow down — don't let that be you.
Excellent work! Now is a good time to start building real projects.
high: Outstanding progress! You're close to job-ready status.
You're in the top tier of learners at this stage. Start applying to jobs!
Almost there! polish your portfolio and start networking now.

skills: Focus on learning [SKILL] next — it's the most in-demand skill in this area.
Building projects with [SKILL] will accelerate your learning 3x.
Many companies specifically require [SKILL] — make it a priority.

career.frontend: Frontend development is one of the most visually rewarding careers. Companies value React and Next.js expertise the most right now.
career.backend: Backend development offers excellent salary growth. Node.js and Python with cloud skills (AWS/GCP) are the hottest combination.
career.datascience: Data Science is booming with the AI revolution. Python, ML frameworks, and now LLM experience are highly sought after.
career.devops: DevOps/Platform Engineering is critical for every company. Kubernetes and cloud certifications can significantly boost your salary.
career.fullstack: Full Stack development gives you the most job opportunities. The MERN/PERN stack with TypeScript and Next.js is the gold standard.

0-25.label: Beginner Stage
0-25.message: You're at the beginning of your journey. Focus on completing the foundational steps first.

26-50.label: Building Skills
26-50.message: Good progress! You've built a foundation. Now focus on practical projects to solidify your knowledge.

51-75.label: Intermediate Level
51-75.message: You're well on your way! Focus on advanced topics and start building production-quality projects.

76-99.label: Job Ready Soon
76-99.message: You're almost there! Polish your portfolio, practice system design interviews, and start applying.

100.label: Job Ready!
100.message: Congratulations! You've completed the roadmap. Now it's time to nail those interviews!
